title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.309 - Zach Wheat Memorial Highway, portion of State Highway 13 in Caldwell County designated as
text:
227.309.  Zach Wheat Memorial Highway, portion of State Highway 13 in Caldwell County designated as. — The portion of State Highway 13 in Caldwell County shall be named "The Zach Wheat Memorial Highway".
(L. 1999 S.B. 61 § 2)
